 Content-Type: text/plain; charset="UTF-8"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 Following=20gratuitous=20help=20from=20jgh@,=20resurrection=20of=20chocol=
 ate-doom=20port
 attempt.=20(v2=20attempt,=20I'm=20sorry=20for=20all=20migration=20linimon=
 @)
 --==o2.pl-WebMail-4669e3ab.14e408a6.64b58==
 Content-Type: text/plain;
 	name="=?UTF-8?Q?chocolate-doomv2=5Fplist.txt?="
 Content-Disposition: attachment;
 	filename="=?UTF-8?Q?chocolate-doomv2=5Fplist.txt?="
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 #=20This=20is=20a=20shell=20archive.=20=20Save=20it=20in=20a=20file,=20re=
 move=20anything=20before
 #=20this=20line,=20and=20then=20unpack=20it=20by=20entering=20"sh=20file"=
 .=20=20Note,=20it=20may
 #=20create=20directories;=20files=20and=20directories=20will=20be=20owned=
 =20by=20you=20and
 #=20have=20default=20permissions.
 #
 #=20This=20archive=20contains:
 #
 #=09chocolate-doom/
 #=09chocolate-doom/files
 #=09chocolate-doom/files/patch-d=5F=5Fiwad.c
 #=09chocolate-doom/pkg-descr
 #=09chocolate-doom/pkg-plist
 #=09chocolate-doom/Makefile
 #=09chocolate-doom/distinfo
 #=09chocolate-doom/pkg-message
 #
 echo=20c=20-=20chocolate-doom/
 mkdir=20-p=20chocolate-doom/=20>=20/dev/null=202>&1
 echo=20c=20-=20chocolate-doom/files
 mkdir=20-p=20chocolate-doom/files=20>=20/dev/null=202>&1
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/files/patch-d=5F=5Fiwad.c
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/files/patch-d=5F=5Fiwad.c=20<<=20'856e08=
 b6eb308b285ef56d806c3500aa'
 X---=20src/d=5Fiwad.c=092011-05-17=2016:01:48.000000000=20-0700
 X+++=20src/d=5Fiwad.c=092011-10-15=2011:30:26.998495197=20-0700
 X@@=20-559,8=20+559,8=20@@
 X=20
 X=20=20=20=20=20//=20Standard=20places=20where=20IWAD=20files=20are=20ins=
 talled=20under=20Unix.
 X=20
 X-=20=20=20=20AddIWADDir("/usr/share/games/doom");
 X-=20=20=20=20AddIWADDir("/usr/local/share/games/doom");
 X+=20=20=20=20AddIWADDir("/usr/share/doom");
 X+=20=20=20=20AddIWADDir("/usr/local/share/doom");
 X=20
 X=20#endif
 X=20
 856e08b6eb308b285ef56d806c3500aa
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/pkg-descr
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/pkg-descr=20<<=20'96993cc311f43f61d5c351=
 0bf9efd3a7'
 XChocolate=20Doom=20is=20a=20port=20of=20ID=20Software's=20Doom,=20Doom=20=
 II,=20and=20Final=20Doom=20to
 Xmodern=20operating=20systems=20that=20aims=20to=20be=20as=20compatible=20=
 with=20the=20original=20DOS
 Xexecutable=20as=20possible.=20This=20includes=20emulating=20all=20the=20=
 different=20versions,
 Xplaying=20demos=20perfectly=20accurately,=20playing=20"vanilla-only"=20P=
 WADS,=20and=20netcode
 Xthat=20works=20on=20newer=20operating=20systems=20while=20still=20behavi=
 ng=20the=20same=20as
 X"vanilla"=20Doom.
 X
 XWWW:=20http://chocolate-doom.org
 96993cc311f43f61d5c3510bf9efd3a7
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/pkg-plist
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/pkg-plist=20<<=20'611e61a9e703d83bb514fa=
 f1bd505b9e'
 Xshare/icons/chocolate-doom.png
 Xshare/icons/chocolate-setup.png
 Xshare/applications/chocolate-doom.desktop
 Xshare/applications/screensavers/chocolate-doom-screensaver.desktop
 Xshare/applications/chocolate-setup.desktop
 Xbin/chocolate-doom
 Xbin/chocolate-server
 Xbin/chocolate-setup
 X@dirrmtry=20share/icons
 X@dirrmtry=20share/applications/screensavers
 X@dirrmtry=20share/applications
 611e61a9e703d83bb514faf1bd505b9e
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/Makefile
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/Makefile=20<<=20'50b62d6b934f06c9e8364d0=
 5357f937b'
 X#=20$FreeBSD$
 X
 XPORTNAME=3D=09chocolate-doom
 XPORTVERSION=3D=091.7.0
 XCATEGORIES=3D=09games
 XMASTER=5FSITES=3D=09SF
 X
 XMAINTAINER=3D=09jakub=5Flach@mailplus.pl
 XCOMMENT=3D=09Doom=20port=20that=20aims=20to=20be=20compatible=20with=20t=
 he=20original=20exe
 X
 XLICENSE=3D=09GPLv2
 X
 XUSE=5FGMAKE=3D=09yes
 XUSE=5FSDL=3D=09mixer=20net=20sdl
 XUSE=5FPYTHON=3D=092.5+
 XMAKE=5FJOBS=5FSAFE=3D=09yes
 XGNU=5FCONFIGURE=3D=09yes
 X
 XMAN5=3D=09=09chocolate-doom.cfg.5=20default.cfg.5
 XMAN6=3D=09=09chocolate-doom.6=20chocolate-server.6=20chocolate-setup.6
 XPORTDOCS=3D=09CMDLINE=20ChangeLog=20HACKING=20INSTALL=20NEWS=20NOT-BUGS=20=
 README=20README.OPL
 X
 X.include=20"${.CURDIR}/../doom-data/Makefile.include"
 X
 X.include=20<bsd.port.options.mk>
 X
 Xpost-patch-script:
 X=09${REINPLACE=5FCMD}=20-e=20's|gamesdir=20=3D=20$$(prefix)/games|gamesd=
 ir=20=3D=20$$(prefix)/bin|'=20\
 X=09=09${WRKSRC}/src/Makefile.in=20${WRKSRC}/setup/Makefile.in
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X=09${INSTALL=5FDATA}=20${WRKSRC}/HACKING=20${DOCSDIR}
 X=09@${CAT}=20${PKGMESSAGE}
 X
 X.include=20<bsd.port.mk>
 50b62d6b934f06c9e8364d05357f937b
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/distinfo
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/distinfo=20<<=20'90239f307c48433aaff5ac6=
 20c5480a0'
 XSHA256=20(chocolate-doom-1.7.0.tar.gz)=20=3D=20c1cffb602e3cc3a82941b4675=
 b9dc816a6e419076faf8f54db46df397f86bfc0
 XSIZE=20(chocolate-doom-1.7.0.tar.gz)=20=3D=201091798
 90239f307c48433aaff5ac620c5480a0
 echo=20x=20-=20chocolate-doom/pkg-message
 sed=20's/^X//'=20>chocolate-doom/pkg-message=20<<=20'd2ee124ecb21d3f5ff8a=
 9cfc269ccb47'
 X**************************************************************
 X
 XTo=20enable=20OPL=20MIDI=20emulation=20you=20need=20to=20run=20chocolate=
 -setup,
 Xdefault=20Native=20MIDI=20is=20very=20similar=20to=20Roland=20SC-55=20th=
 ough.
 X
 X**************************************************************
 d2ee124ecb21d3f5ff8a9cfc269ccb47
 exit
